label: Live Order Book
description: HFT-style live order book with bid/ask columns, depth aggregation, and spread legend.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary via widget-wrapper.tsx ✓. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[markets-data] ✓. 0.3 availableOn=[markets] ✓. 0.4 No any/@ts-ignore ✓. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports in widget file ✓ (imports CRYPTO_VENUES/TRADFI_VENUES from lib/config). 0.6 isLoading={isLoading} already present ✓. 0.7 isEmpty={isDefi || rows.length === 0} ✓. 0.8 FIXED — added error/onRetry props from context. 0.9 No dead code ✓.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data from useMarketsData().liveBookUpdates — no inline fetch ✓. 1.2 Context calls useGlobalScope() ✓. 1.3–1.5 liveBookUpdates is market-wide book data; scope filtering is not applicable (book shows all market participants by design). 1.6 Empty scope → full book shown ✓. 1.7 CRYPTO_VENUES and TRADFI_VENUES imported from lib/config/services/markets.config ✓ (correct location per spec).

findings: isBatch disables liveBookUpdates in context (returns []) — widget correctly shows empty state in batch mode via isEmpty check ✓.
bookDepth drives dynamic column count — verify column header/cell alignment at depth=10 for L4 scroll check.
